name: /standards-add: --dry-run prints what would be written but creates no files (per §2.14 dry-run contract)
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-add.sh" https://x.com --id x --tier 1 --applies-to typescript --dry-run && [ ! -s .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml ] && echo ok 1>&2
